<!-- Feature/Enhancement PR template -->

## Description

- Describe the feature and why it's needed.

## Implementation notes

- High-level notes on implementation, important files changed.

## Testing instructions

- Manual steps and automated tests run.

## Backwards compatibility

- Any breaking changes? How to migrate if needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Lint passed (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Documentation updated
